metadata.description: Minimal Claude marketplace for exercising fully interchangeable Cowork mise shims

plugins.name: sa-mise
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture that bootstraps and shares the latest mise binary through the generated shared shim

plugins.name: sa-mise-forwarder
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture that uses the exact same generated mise shim as the primary fixture

plugins.name: sa-mise-cross-plugin
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture that validates cross-plugin shared-runtime recovery with the same generated mise shim
